body_txt: This is a relatively recent trope ; almost all shows or manga using it have shown up in the 21st century. In even more recent media, this trope has seen a much wider range of uses, ranging from making a character look funny, depicting a frightening berserker rage , depicting someone knocked out or dead, or simply depicting eyes on a character too far away to be drawn in detail. See also Prophet Eyes for characters whose eyes are always completely white , and Color Failure for when they lose color all over. In some cases, it can also overlap with Dies Wide Open . You can sort of do this if you roll your eyes into the back of your head.
